sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vanglian Pasian Topa Na min kong phat den ding hi
Vanglian Pasian Topa Na min kong phat den ding hi
Zingsang simin Nang kong zong ding
Nong thuhilhna bang mangin hong zui ning

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kal khat khit khat Aman hong kha
Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding
Nisim in Topa ka zui den ding
Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding
Kal khat khit khat Aman hong kha
Nisim in Topa nung ka zui den ding
